item.title: Show HN: Duckle is a local-first ETL/ELT framework powered by DuckDB
item.summary: You can now define pipelines in Python. DuckDB executes them as optimized, vectorized SQL. Your data stays on your machine from start to finish. Comments URL: https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=48991087 Points: 1 # Comments: 0
